# filmwithbigstory.com
> Big Story Media Production · Dubai, UAE

## About
Big Story is a premium cinema production company based in Dubai. We produce TV commercials, brand films, corporate videos, documentaries, event coverage, and social media content for the GCC market.

## Services
- TVC & Commercial Production
- Brand Films
- Corporate Video Production
- Product Videos
- Social Content
- Event Coverage
- Documentary

## Equipment Rentals
- RED Komodo X 6K cinema camera
- ARRI Alexa Mini
- Sony Venice
- DZOFilm Arles cine prime set (25/35/50/75/100mm)
- Aputure LED lighting
- Ronin / Movi Pro gimbals
